HORNET_HOME.description: Primary Training Facility. Ideal for flight dynamics testing.

TRINO_PLANT.description: Dismissed nuclear plant. Surveillance required for illegal entry detection.

FUKUSHIMA_PLANT.description: Disaster Response Zone. High radiation risk. Rotate assets to monitor plant and reactors.

CHERNOBYL_PLANT.description: Exclusion Zone. Long-range surveillance required for illegal entry detection.

MUSEUM.description: High-Value Asset Protection (Castello di Rivoli). Monitor for unauthorized access in restricted galleries.

BONIFACIO_STRAIT.description: Maritime SAR. High currents. Search for distress signals from vessels.

MONVISO_ALPINE.description: Alpine SAR. High altitude. Search for missing climbers.

TORINO_MEDICAL.description: Urban Logistics (Molinette Hospital). Organ/Blood transport corridor.

ERBIL_BASE.description: Forward Operating Base (Iraq). Perimeter defense and convoy overwatch.

ACQUI.description: Training Facility. For flight dynamics testing.
